media.contentEmpty: Select a group, angle or scene to see its media
media.noScenes: No scenes yet — select files and create one
media.previewHint: Double-click to load in the monitor
media.moveToHint: Moves the selected clips to another camera in this shooting day
media.noMoveTarget: No other sound source in this shooting day.

project.title: Project
project.fpsHint: The project's time grid. Sync offsets are measured in it. Changing it after syncing requires syncing again.
project.startTcHint: Timecode of the timeline's first clip. Becomes the sequence start in the NLE.

split.title: More than one source in this folder
split.hint: I found {{cams}} camera(s) and {{sounds}} sound recorder(s) inside "{{folder}}" — the files follow different naming patterns. Please confirm before importing.
split.orderHint: The list order defines which is CAM A, CAM B… Use the arrows to reorder.

processing.readingHint: Timecode, framerate and duration of each clip
processing.startingHint: Loading the audio processor — this takes a few seconds
processing.waveformsHint: In the background — the sync is ready and can be used

settings.title: Settings
settings.cacheHint: Waveforms and metadata already read. Clearing loses no work — it only makes the app read the files again next time.
settings.cacheMaxHint: Past the limit, the least recently used items are deleted to make room for new ones.
settings.logsHint: Where the app records what it did — this is what to attach when reporting a bug.
settings.movedHint: The current cache is not moved: the new location starts empty.
settings.clearBlockedByMove: Save the new location first — clearing now would wipe the previous location's cache.
settings.loadError: Could not read the settings from the media processor.

monitor.title: Monitor
monitor.vlcHint: The WebView can't play this format — falling back to VLC. Paused seeking may land on the previous keyframe.
monitor.closePreview: Close preview and return to sync
monitor.previewNoDecode: No video decoder for this format on this system — audio still plays normally.
monitor.needsVlc: This format needs VLC to show in the monitor. Install VLC and restart Órbita. Syncing works normally without it.
monitor.noEngine: Couldn't display this format — neither the built-in player nor VLC could handle it. Syncing works normally.

sync.statusIdle: Add at least 2 clips to sync.
sync.waitLoading: Wait for the metadata reading to finish
sync.flagsHint: {{n}} clip(s) need manual review in the NLE.
sync.takesSummary: {{takes}} takes synced · {{orphans}} clips without direct sound

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.empty: Sync the clips to see the timeline

flagReasons.no_sound: No matching direct sound — the camera rolled outside a take
flagReasons.no_audio: The camera has no audio track — nothing to sync against
flagReasons.no_tc: No timecode — in Timecode mode this clip can't be positioned
flagReasons.no_camera: Sound with no matching camera — positioned by its own timecode
flagReasons.tc_only: Placed by timecode: the waveform did not confirm it
flagReasons.unverified: No reliable timecode nearby and the correlation is unsure — check it
flagReasons.ambiguous_no_anchor: Ambiguous, with no confident neighbour to disambiguate
flagReasons.anchor_window_impossible: The neighbours leave no room for this clip

timeline.closeGapsHint: Butts the takes against each other, no gaps and no overlap. The whole take moves — the sync doesn't change.
timeline.closeGapsSceneHint: Whole shooting day only: in a scene, the gaps belong to clips the view hides.
timeline.confirmHint: Mark this clip as reviewed — the alert clears
timeline.tcPlaced: Positioned by timecode only — not verified by the waveform
timeline.editHint: Drag a clip to fix it · drag on empty space to lasso · ←/→ moves 1 frame (Shift = 10)
timeline.revertHint: Back to the position the sync computed
timeline.peaksHint: Generating the camera waveforms in the background. The sync is already done — this is just the wave drawing, and you can work while it arrives.
timeline.revertOriginalHint: Back to the sync the app computed, discarding confirmations
timeline.resyncHint: Recomputes sync only for the selected clips, using the rest of the day as reference

groups.addSource: Add a camera or the direct sound
groups.removeSource: Remove this source from the day
groups.flipKind: Switch: is it a camera or the direct sound?
groups.cannotBeCamera: No video track — cannot be a camera
groups.emptyGroup: Drag in the camera folder or the direct sound folder — or click to pick one
groups.dropHint: Create a shooting day and drag into it each camera folder and the direct sound folder
groups.alreadyInGroup: These files are already in "{{group}}". A file can only live in one day.
groups.activeDay: The shooting day shown in the timeline and monitor
groups.newSubGroupHint: Groups the selected clips into a scene of this day. The take's sound comes along.
groups.activeSubGroup: The scene shown in the timeline — the sync is the day's own
groups.removeSubGroup: Delete this scene (the files stay in the day)
groups.emptySubGroup: This scene has no files left

export.includeCameraAudioHint: Include the camera's original sound on the audio tracks, after the direct sound (A1..An = direct sound; A(n+1).. = camera).
export.subGroupsTitle: What should each scene become in Premiere?
export.subGroupsHint: Multicam is for EDITING (the monitor switches angles live). A plain sequence is for viewing and checking. The sync is the same either way.

footer.reportBugHint: Opens the feedback and bug report form

alpha.title: Alpha version
alpha.body: Orbita is in Alpha: always check the result before trusting it, and report any error or suggestion through the feedback form.
